full_text:
Han Yan (Bonan) 韓縯 (伯南)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Han Yan (韓縯), styledBonan (伯南). Served as an Excellency for the Han. Very strict about being professional. Han Yan was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
